command_block.name: 脉冲命令方块
command_block.behavior: triggered once by redstone or button

chain_command_block.name: 连锁命令方块
chain_command_block.behavior: executes when preceding block in chain completes

properties.conditional: Only executes if preceding command block succeeded

chain_rules: Chain command blocks must face each other in sequence
A chain starts with either an impulse or repeating block
Chain blocks execute in the direction they face
execution_order: Repeating → Chain (in facing direction) → execute per tick
